bricklaying.title: Bricklaying
bricklaying.short_intro: High quality brickwork for new builds, extensions, garden walls and more.
bricklaying.page_content:
At QB Building Solutions, we provide professional bricklaying services for projects of all sizes. Whether you need a new garden wall, structural brickwork for an extension or brickwork for a complete new build, we deliver a strong and reliable finish.

We take care to match existing brickwork wherever possible and ensure every project is completed neatly, safely and to a high standard.

Our bricklaying services include:

  • New build brickwork
  • Home extensions
  • Garden and boundary walls
  • Brick repairs and repointing
  • Structural alterations
  • Door and window openings

Contact us to discuss your bricklaying requirements and arrange a quotation.

joinery.title: Joinery
joinery.short_intro: Bespoke carpentry and joinery services, from doors to kitchen installations.
joinery.page_content:
Our joinery services cover everything from small carpentry jobs to complete kitchen installations. We create practical, attractive and durable results tailored to your property.

Whether you need new internal doors, custom storage or timber work as part of a renovation, we can manage the work from preparation through to installation.

Our joinery services include:

  • Kitchen fitting
  • Internal and external doors
  • Skirting boards and architraves
  • Custom shelving and storage
  • Stud walls and timber framing
  • Flooring and finishing work

Every installation is measured carefully and completed with close attention to detail.

site-management.title: Site Management
site-management.short_intro: Professional site management to ensure your project runs smoothly.
site-management.page_content:
Effective site management is essential for keeping a building project organised, safe and on schedule. We provide experienced site management for residential and commercial construction projects.

We coordinate trades, monitor progress, manage deliveries and help resolve issues before they cause unnecessary delays.

Our site management service includes:

  • Planning and scheduling work
  • Coordinating contractors and trades
  • Monitoring workmanship
  • Managing materials and deliveries
  • Maintaining site safety
  • Providing progress updates

Our aim is to keep every stage of your project moving efficiently while maintaining high standards throughout.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.short_intro: Single and double-storey extensions that create the extra space you need, managed from design to completion.
extensions.page_content:
A home extension can provide the extra space you need without the cost and disruption of moving. We build single and double-storey extensions designed around your property and the way you want to use it.

From the initial groundwork and structural work through to roofing, joinery and internal finishes, we can manage the full construction process.

Extension projects can include:

  • Kitchen extensions
  • Living and dining spaces
  • Additional bedrooms
  • Home offices
  • Utility rooms
  • Garage conversions and extensions

We work closely with homeowners throughout the project to deliver an extension that feels like a natural part of the existing property.

new-builds.title: New Builds
new-builds.short_intro: Complete new build homes constructed to the highest standards, with support at every stage.
new-builds.page_content:
Building a new home is a major project, and choosing the right building team makes all the difference. We provide complete new build construction services, helping turn approved plans into a finished property.

We manage the work carefully from the foundations upwards, ensuring each stage is completed correctly and in line with the required specifications.

Our new build service covers:

  • Groundworks and foundations
  • Brick and block construction
  • Roofing and structural work
  • Windows and doors
  • Internal joinery and finishes
  • Coordination of specialist trades

We maintain clear communication throughout the build so you always know how the project is progressing.

general-building.title: General Building
general-building.short_intro: From minor repairs to full renovations, we cover all aspects of building work.
general-building.page_content:
Our general building service covers a wide range of repairs, improvements and renovation projects. No matter the size of the job, we approach every project with the same care and attention.

We can carry out standalone building work or manage several trades as part of a larger property improvement project.

Our general building services include:

  • Property renovations
  • Structural alterations
  • Internal wall changes
  • Repairs and maintenance
  • Plastering and finishing
  • Outdoor building work

Tell us what you want to improve, and we will help identify the most practical way to complete the work.
